race.description: Ladbrokes Place Extra To 10th Mdn Hcp
race.comment: NOT TELLING (1) gets the nod after an excellent debut effort when beaten a nose at Warwick before being sent for a spell. He did plenty wrong that day but still came within a whisker of victory and has since won a trial at Doomben, suggesting he has returned in good order. With natural improvement he looks the one they all have to beat. YONAKA (10) has been racing consistently and was only narrowly denied when runner-up at Nanango last start. She should settle prominently and give a good account again. ITZAJUNGLEOUTTHERE (4) resumes after a sound debut effort at Ipswich in December when beaten only three lengths and is another who warrants respect fresh.
